title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Adhesives & Allied Products

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Adhesives & Allied Products
jsonLd.description:
We at Adhesives & Allied Products are looking for an experienced Production Engineer based out of Meerut. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Adhesives & Allied Products:
Adhesives & Allied Products is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Quality Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adhesives & Allied Products!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
